title: Tender Crunchy Algerian Dough Bake
description: A comforting Algerian dish featuring tender dough topped with a crunchy mustardy crust, perfect for a sick-day meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine bread flour, warm water, yeast, and salt. Mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together rendered duck fat, whole wheat flour, mustard powder, garlic powder, and sugar.
Spread the fat mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Cut the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the size of your mini cocottes.
Place each piece of dough into a mini cocotte and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
